name: libnet-libidn-perl
title: libnet-libidn-perl
description:
Perl bindings for GNU Libidn
Net::LibIDN provides bindings for GNU Libidn, a C library for handling
Internationalized Domain Names according to IDNA (RFC 3490), in a way very
much inspired by Turbo Fredriksson's PHP-IDN.
use_cases: When you need Kali Linux, use libnet-libidn-perl because Perl bindings for GNU Libidn.
When the engagement is in the install phase, use libnet-libidn-perl as a cataloged Kali Linux tool with operator ACCEPT/CANCEL gating.
When chaining Kali Linux tools, pair libnet-libidn-perl with sibling catalog entries sharing its attack_surface/phase_hint.
When validating lab setup, run `libnet-libidn-perl --help` (or the README entrypoint) and confirm required hardware/deps from the catalog.
